name: sample-aws-pricing-calculator-mcp
description: MCP server for creating, reading, updating AWS Pricing Calculator estimates through natural language.

scripts.build: esbuild mcp-server.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/mcp-server.js --format=cjs --minify && rm -f dist/aws-calculator.zip && zip dist/aws-calculator.zip mcp-server.js lib/aws-client.js lib/estimate-builder.js lib/ec2.js package.json
